description: TruAnon provides identity and trust/age-assurance services for online platforms, focused on privacy-preserving member verification and reputation signals. Its public website describes the product as a way for platforms to validate member credibility without storing private identity documents.
summary: TruAnon exposes one documented integration surface: a bearer-authenticated HTTP API (“TruAnon Private API”) published as an OpenAPI/Postman collection against `https://staging.truanon.com`.
